title: RCT-609 1st Tenkaichi Nipple Martial Arts Tournament
overview: Revolutionary Naked Sports Festival Fighting in Nipple Fighting Competition! Eight nipple fighters from all over the country who trained their nipples gathered and competed for total points in five stages such as nipple weightlifting and hammer throwing! The last is a nipple sumo tournament that draws strings with clothespins sandwiched between nipples! Whose nipple is the strongest in the world ... A serious battle for pride begins now!
